description: Operational status of the Hazelcast CP Subsystem – Raft health, leader elections, commit progress, CP object inventory, and member health. Raft metrics: hz_raft_* (V1). Per-member metrics: hazelcast_* with mc_member label (V2).

panels.description: Number of active CP members as seen by the METADATA Raft group leader. Should equal cp-member-count (5).
panels.title: Active CP Members

panels.description: Number of CP groups tracked by the METADATA group. Increases as new groups are created on first use.
panels.title: CP Groups

panels.description: CP members that have been unreachable but not yet removed. Any value > 0 is a warning.
panels.title: Missing CP Members

panels.description: Count of terminated (destroyed) Raft group node IDs. Should remain 0 in normal operation.
panels.title: Terminated Raft Groups

panels.description: Sum of term increments across all CP groups in the past 15 minutes.
panels.title: Leader Elections (last 15 min)

panels.description: Max of (commitIndex − lastApplied) across all groups. Non-zero means at least one follower has uncommitted entries to apply.
panels.title: Max Commit Lag

panels.description: Per-group Raft state snapshot. Metrics: hz_raft_group_*.
panels.title: CP Group Status Table

panels.description: hz_raft_group_term. A sudden step-up = leader election. A stalled term on one group while others advance = isolated member.
panels.title: Raft Term per CP Group

panels.description: hz_raft_group_commitIndex. All healthy members of a group converge to the same value.
panels.title: Commit Index per CP Group

panels.description: rate(hz_raft_group_commitIndex[1m]). CP subsystem write throughput.
panels.title: Commit Rate (entries/s)

panels.description: hz_raft_group_commitIndex − hz_raft_group_lastApplied. Sustained > 0 means a follower is falling behind.
panels.title: Commit Lag (commitIndex − lastApplied)

panels.description: hz_raft_group_snapshotIndex. Advances on Raft log compaction.
panels.title: Snapshot Index per CP Group

panels.description: hz_raft_group_availableLogCapacity. Drops towards 0 as uncommitted entries accumulate. Reaching 0 blocks new appends.
panels.title: Available Log Capacity per CP Group

panels.description: increase(hz_raft_group_term[$__interval]). Each bar = a leader election in that group.
panels.title: Leader Elections (term step-ups)

panels.description: hz_raft_group_lastLogTerm vs hz_raft_group_term. They diverge briefly during an election when the leader appends a no-op entry.
panels.title: Last Log Term vs Commit Term

panels.description: hazelcast_cp_summary_total{state="live"} (V2). Appears once CP data structures are created by a client.
panels.title: Live CP Objects by Type

panels.description: hazelcast_cp_summary_total{state="destroyed"} (V2). A spike may indicate a misconfigured client.
panels.title: Destroyed CP Objects by Type

panels.description: hazelcast_cp_summary_total (V2) – live and destroyed counts for all CP data structure types.
panels.title: CP Object Lifecycle over Time

panels.description: hz_healthcheck_status_* (V1) from Management Center.
panels.title: MC Health Check Results

panels.description: hazelcast_runtime_up_time_seconds_total per mc_member. Gaps or resets indicate restarts.
panels.title: Member Uptime

panels.description: hazelcast_runtime_used_memory_bytes per mc_member. High heap pressure can affect CP latency.
panels.title: JVM Heap Used

panels.description: up{job="hazelcast"} = 1 means Prometheus can scrape Management Center.
panels.title: Management Center Scrape Up

panels.description: Member count per Raft group per member. Should equal group-size (3). Drop below majority = loss of quorum.
panels.title: Raft Group Member Count (Quorum Health)

panels.description: One track per (group × member). The active band shows which member currently leads that group. A new band appears on leader change (term step-up).
panels.title: Raft Leader per CP Group (over time)

panels.description: Entries in the Raft log since the last snapshot. Approaches commit-index-advance-count-to-snapshot (10000) before a new snapshot is triggered.
panels.title: Log Entries Since Last Snapshot

panels.description: Total number of entries per CP Map (summed across members reporting this map).
panels.title: CP Map Entry Count

panels.description: Total storage consumed per CP Map in bytes.
panels.title: CP Map Storage (bytes)

title: Hazelcast CP Subsystem
